title: pyrus bibas
intro: Pyrus bibas, commonly known as Mountain Apple, is a plant species native to the Himalayan region. The Mountain Apple plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include alleviating respiratory issues, such as coughs and bronchitis, due to its expectorant properties. The health benefits of Pyrus bibas stem from its therapeutic actions, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which are attributed to its bioactive constituents, including flavonoids, phenolic acids, and saponins. These bioactive compounds are responsible for the plant's ability to modulate the immune system and provide protection against oxidative stress and inflammation.
